title: Scott Carnes
html:
Scott Carnes

Stub. The local-business contact behind the "Scott Carnes coding zeal" internship lead in late-2019 Grants Pass (2019 10 29 talk to mrs bland about internship, 2019 11 13 coding zeal). Coding Zeal is the Medford-area dev shop; Scott appears to be the principal Yahir was being routed to via Mrs. Bland for an internship. The phrase became the title of the November 13, 2019 mega-todo — suggesting this lead loomed large that month even though it never seems to have converted.

Source summaries

  • 2019 10 29 talk to mrs bland about internship
  • 2019 11 13 coding zeal
